content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 2.1 — description claims ("works fully offline", "export as PDF") both match code evidence: LocalStore.swift uses only on-device JSON persistence with no networking (App/LocalStore.swift:1-19), and PDFExporter.swift implements PDF rendering via UIGraphicsPDFRenderer (App/PDFExporter.swift:1-16); no AI/sync/ad-block claims present to contradict.
